title: Cure's Fakemon Stuff
description: Adds my own Fakemon to Cobblemon, usually new evolutions, regional variants, etc!
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d3e5297ea85250b7160244e836424ec9aa24cbc.png)

# Welcome to Cryptonia!
Thank you for checking out my Fakemon Datapack! Here you'll find several wonderfully weird Fakemon that I've designed and add them to your Cobblemon world!

### How to Install
Simply place the downloaded .zip file to your world's datapack folder and resourcepacks folder. Easy peasy!

### Public Servers
I personally do not allow my Fakemon designs to be used for Public Servers unless it's ran by people I both know and trust, unless you're one of my friends I'd kindly ask you not use my Fakemon in any Public Servers.

## Fakemon Currently Added + Info!

<details>
<summary>Macholope</summary>

  ![Macholope](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/19e0ac14cb002a2c54c444e2da9171ccfc15fbb2.png)

  - **Macholope**
- Typing: Normal/Fighting
- Abilities: Justified/Limber/HA: Moxie
- Evolution Method: Evolves from Male Buneary with a Dawn Stone
</details>



<details>
<summary>Pikaboo</summary>

## Credits:
All Fakemon designs were made by me, with some assistance with texturing from JetSetter, with most models and textures edited from the Cobblemon mod. This mod was a big passion project of mine and it wouldn't be possible without the amazing creators of Cobblemon and the modding community in general for such great inspiration.
